scripts.deploy: pnpm run db:migrate:prod && wrangler types && wrangler deploy
scripts.db:codegen: dotenv -e .env -- drizzle-kit migrate --config=./src/lib/db/config.dev.ts && DATABASE_URL='./pouch.db' kysely-codegen --dialect sqlite --out-file ./src/lib/db/types.ts --exclude-pattern=__drizzle_migrations

JWT_SECRET.description: Generate a strong secret and keep it safe (`openssl rand -hex 32`). You will need it to create API keys.

DOCS_SECRET.description: Password for the `/docs` Scalar API reference endpoint.

MEDIA_PUBLIC_URL.description: Public base URL for serving uploaded media files.

MEDIA_BUCKET.description: R2 bucket for storing uploaded media files.
